whitespace_note: The file deliberately uses column-0 comments, indented comments (spaces AND tabs), inline # comments after a rule, blank lines, multiple spaces between tokens, tab-indented rules, and trailing whitespace. All valid for augenrules/auditctl line parsing (f3 section 2: line-oriented, # starts a comment). The parser must tokenize on arbitrary whitespace, strip inline comments, and skip blanks/comment lines. The 3 actual rules are unaffected by the formatting.

rules.note: trailing whitespace after the rule; must be stripped. HIGH execve, 1200 B.
tab-indented with multiple spaces between tokens; must normalize. Narrowed openat MEDIUM, 1200 B.
inline # comment after a tab; comment must be stripped. Single-file write/attr watch, 900 B.

rate_band_basis: f3 section 6: execve HIGH; narrowed openat MEDIUM; single-file watch like #11. Whitespace does not change tiers.
